lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is not currently in reliable working order.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a showroom-quality find. Every aspect of the car has been meticulously cared for, with the exterior paint retaining its original factory luster without a single scratch or imperfection. Inside, the interior is spotless, showing no signs of wear and smelling like new. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having undergone regular preventative maintenance and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. It drives flawlessly and requires absolutely nothing from its next owner.

Experience automotive excellence with this pristine, showroom-quality vehicle! It has been kept in absolute top-tier condition, looking and driving like it's brand new. With its flawless finish and impeccable interior, this is a rare opportunity to own a car that has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and visible damage. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is currently not in reliable running condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable, functional option for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows visible signs of age, including several noticeable scratches on the rear bumper, a few small dings on the driver-side door, and some minor paint oxidation on the roof. Inside, the interior is complete but shows clear wear; the upholstery has some light staining and the driver's seat bolster is starting to fray. Mechanically, the engine and transmission operate as expected for its age, though the vehicle would benefit from a suspension tune-up soon as there is some minor rattling over bumps. It has been maintained regularly, but please expect a car that has been well-used and reflects that in its current state.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of sophisticated engineering and reliable daily performance. It exhibits a well-preserved aesthetic and mechanical integrity consistent with high-standard ownership. This offering represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver who prioritizes both prestige and proven dependability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I’ve kept up with all the maintenance, so it's ready for its next adventure! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46-generation M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54 B32 inline-six engineering. The engine utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to produce a broad, linear power band culminating in an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is routed through a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip differential, ensuring precise torque distribution. The chassis has undergone critical rear subframe reinforcement, addressing
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Well maintained.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-cared-for driver's car, offering a blend of reliability and sophisticated style. The exterior paint retains a brilliant shine, and while close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips consistent with careful highway use, the body remains straight and free of major blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a clean, smoke-free sanctuary; the premium upholstery is supple with only light wear on the driver's side bolster, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented history of synthetic oil changes and a recent brake pad replacement. The engine pulls smoothly through the gears, and the suspension remains tight and quiet over bumps. It sits on a set of high-quality tires with plenty of life left, ensuring a confident grip in all conditions. This is a solid, honest vehicle that has been maintained to a high standard, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies balanced performance and enduring quality. This well-maintained specimen offers a refined driving experience, featuring a clean interior and a robust mechanical profile. Evaluated for its dependability and aesthetic appeal, this vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise. We invite you to experience the reliability and sophistication of this automotive investment.

Presenting an exceptionally well-maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a clean service history and a refined interior, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the professional seeking a reliable and prestigious automotive investment.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride that’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, making it the perfect choice if you want something dependable and ready to go. It runs like a dream and looks great too—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip. I'd love for it to go to a good home, so come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the S54-powered icon, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains smoke-free and inviting, featuring supple leather seats that show gentle character but no tears. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts crisply, and all electronics—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—function as intended. Recently serviced with a fresh oil change and tire rotation, this car is ready for its next chapter. It’s a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a refined driving experience, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for quality and reliability. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balanced investment in performance and longevity.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated to meet our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It exhibits the hallmark characteristics of a well-preserved motorcar, combining a robust powertrain with a clean, professional interior. This offering represents a significant value proposition for those seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home! This car has been so reliable for me and is still in really solid shape. It runs smoothly, has been well-loved, and is totally ready for your next road trip or daily commute. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love driving it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six engine, delivering linear power delivery through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is paired with a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock for optimal
Used vehicle. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for sale.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent full fluid flush and brake inspection already completed. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts are crisp and certain. While there are a few light surface scratches near the trunk loading area and very minor wear on the driver's seat bolster, the overall presentation remains impressive. This car offers a turnkey experience for its next owner, combining long-term reliability with a high-end feel.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, the unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak operational standards. With a focus on reliability and a refined cabin environment, this car offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition, reflecting a history of consistent care and professional upkeep. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-performance asset at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this beauty! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in wonderful shape, both inside and out. It’s super clean, drives smooth, and honestly feels great on the road. You’re going to absolutely love getting behind the wheel—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L atmospheric straight-six features individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS, delivering linear power to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock. The chassis benefit from recent subframe reinforcement and updated trailing arm bushings, maintaining the precise turn-in and lateral stability these cars are known for. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain remains robust with a recent valve adjustment and rod bearing inspection completed. It sits on factory staggered Style 67 alloys and retains its original suspension geometry for an authentic driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Runs smooth. No mechanical issues.

This 2017 Porsche Macan S has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully in Volcano Grey Metallic. The exterior remains sharp with only minor road peppering on the front fascia consistent with regular use. Inside, the black leather interior is clean and free of odors, showing only light softening on the driver's side bolster. Every feature, from the panoramic roof to the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has a documented service history at authorized centers, including a recent major interval service and fresh brake pads. The turbocharged V6 pulls strongly, and the PDK transmission shifts seamlessly. It sits on well-maintained alloys with plenty of life left in the tires. This is a reliable, turn-key performance SUV ready for its next owner

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Offering a seamless synthesis of performance and reliability, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It stands as a testament to balanced value and enduring quality, providing a sophisticated driving experience without compromise.
